questions.question: Pipe fitting ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Fluids ko ek jagah se dusri jagah transport karna

questions.explanation: Pipe fitting ka mukhya uddeshya fluids (jaise paani, gas) ko ek location se dusri location tak safely aur efficiently transport karna hai.

questions.question: Kisi bhi pipe fitting job shuru karne se pehle sabse pehla safety step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) pehenna

questions.explanation: Safety ke liye, koi bhi kaam shuru karne se pehle PPE (jaise safety glasses, gloves, helmet, safety shoes) pehenna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Confined space mein kaam karte waqt kis cheez ka special dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Ventilation ka

questions.explanation: Confined spaces mein oxygen ki kami ya toxic gases ka khatra hota hai, isliye proper ventilation ensure karna bahut important hai.

questions.question: Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedure ka kya maqsad hai?

options.A: Equipment ko lock karna taaki koi chori na kar sake
options.B: Machine ko accidentally start hone se rokna maintenance ke dauraan

questions.explanation: LOTO ka maqsad hai energy sources ko isolate aur lock karna taaki maintenance ya repairs ke waqt machine accidentally start na ho, जिससे serious injuries se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Hot work permit kab zaroori hota hai?

options.A: Jab bhi welding ya cutting involve ho
options.B: Jab bhi high temperature mein kaam karna ho
options.C: Jab bhi chemical use karna ho
options.D: Jab bhi heavy lifting karna ho

questions.explanation: Hot work permit tab zaroori hota hai jab bhi welding, cutting, grinding jaise kaam ho jismein heat ya sparks generate hote hain, fire hazard ko manage karne ke liye.

questions.question: Ek pipe fitter ke liye good housekeeping ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Workplace ko clean aur organized rakhna

questions.explanation: Good housekeeping ka matlab hai workplace ko saaf, tidy aur organized rakhna taaki accidents aur hazards ko minimize kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Ergonomics ka pipe fitting mein kya importance hai?

options.B: Workplace ko comfortable aur efficient banana, injuries se bachne ke liye
options.D: Pipe ke diameter ko calculate karna

questions.explanation: Ergonomics ka maqsad hai workplace design aur tools ko is tarah optimize karna ki workers comfortable hon, unki productivity badhe aur repetitive strain injuries jaise musculoskeletal disorders se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Hazardous materials ke saath kaam karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: MSDS (Material Safety Data Sheet) padhna aur proper PPE use karna
options.D: Kisi aur ko kaam karne dena

questions.explanation: Hazardous materials ke saath kaam karte waqt, MSDS padhkar uski properties aur safety measures ko samajhna aur appropriate PPE (jaise respirator, chemical-resistant gloves) use karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek pipe fitter ko kis type ke fire extinguisher ki basic knowledge honi chahiye?

options.B: Sirf CO2
options.C: Different classes (A, B, C, D, K) aur unka use

questions.explanation: Ek pipe fitter ko alag-alag fire classes (jaise A for ordinary combustibles, B for flammable liquids, C for electrical) aur unke liye suitable extinguisher ke baare mein pata hona chahiye.

questions.question: Working at height par safety ke liye kya use karna mandatory hai?

options.B: Safety harness

questions.explanation: Heights par kaam karte waqt girne se bachne ke liye safety harness ka use karna mandatory hai.

questions.question: Kis type ki injury pipe fitting mein sabse common hai?

options.B: Cuts aur abrasions

questions.explanation: Tools aur sharp edges ke karan cuts aur abrasions pipe fitting mein common injuries hain, isliye gloves pehenna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Manual handling operations mein injuries se bachne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Sahi lifting techniques ka use karna ya mechanical aids lena

questions.explanation: Heavy objects ko lift karte waqt back injuries se bachne ke liye sahi lifting techniques (jaise ghutne mod kar lift karna) ka use karna ya cranes/trolleys jaise mechanical aids lena chahiye.

questions.question: Ek pipe fitter ke liye 'Tagout' ka kya matlab hai LOTO procedure mein?

options.A: Ek warning tag lagana ki equipment under maintenance hai
options.B: Equipment ko permanently disable karna
options.C: Equipment ko inventory ke liye tag karna

questions.explanation: Tagout mein ek tag lagaya jaata hai jo clearly batata hai ki equipment ko operate nahi karna hai kyunki us par kaam chal raha hai.

questions.question: Electrical hazards se bachne ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Insulated tools use karna aur power off karna

questions.explanation: Electrical hazards se bachne ke liye hamesha insulated tools ka use karein aur kisi bhi electrical kaam se pehle power source ko disconnect (off) karein.

questions.question: Noise pollution se hearing loss se bachne ke liye kya use karna chahiye?

options.B: Earplugs ya earmuffs

questions.explanation: High noise levels wale areas mein kaam karte waqt hearing loss se bachne ke liye earplugs ya earmuffs ka use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Work permit system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Kaam ki safety ko ensure karna aur hazards ko identify karna

questions.explanation: Work permit system ek formal system hai jo high-risk activities ko control karta hai. Ye ensure karta hai ki kaam shuru hone se pehle sabhi hazards ko identify kiya gaya hai aur necessary safety precautions li gayi hain.

questions.question: Emergency exit routes ko hamesha clear kyun rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Taaki log aasani se aaja sakein
options.B: Taaki emergency mein log safely bahar nikal sakein
options.C: Taaki saman aasani se move ho sake

questions.explanation: Emergency exit routes ko hamesha clear rakhna chahiye taaki aag ya kisi aur emergency ki sthiti mein log bina rukawat ke bahar nikal sakein.

questions.question: Domestic plumbing mein commonly use hone wala plastic pipe material kaun sa hai?

options.B: MS (Mild Steel)

questions.explanation: PVC pipes domestic plumbing mein water supply aur drainage ke liye bahut commonly use hote hain kyunki ye lightweight, corrosion-resistant aur affordable hote hain.

questions.question: High-pressure aur high-temperature applications ke liye kaun sa pipe material prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.B: CPVC

questions.explanation: Steel pipes (Mild Steel ya Galvanized Iron) apni high strength aur pressure-bearing capacity ke karan high-pressure aur high-temperature industrial applications mein prefer kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: CPVC pipes ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Copper Polyvinyl Chloride

questions.explanation: CPVC ka full form Chlorinated Polyvinyl Chloride hai, jo PVC se zyada temperature resist kar sakta hai.

questions.question: PPR pipes kis application ke liye best suited hain?

options.B: Cold water supply only

questions.explanation: PPR (Polypropylene Random Copolymer) pipes hot aur cold water supply ke liye ideal hain kyunki ye high temperatures ko handle kar sakte hain aur chemical resistant bhi hote hain.

questions.question: GI pipes ki coating kis metal ki hoti hai?

options.B: Aluminium

questions.explanation: GI (Galvanized Iron) pipes ko corrosion se bachane ke liye zinc ki layer se coat kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Copper pipes ka main fayda kya hai plumbing mein?

options.B: Excellent corrosion resistance aur heat transfer properties
options.C: Install karna bahut aasan hota hai

questions.explanation: Copper pipes apni excellent corrosion resistance aur high thermal conductivity ke liye jaane jaate hain, jo unhe hot water systems aur HVAC applications ke liye ideal banata hai.

questions.question: Pipe ke 'Nominal Bore' (NB) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Pipe ka actual inner diameter
options.C: Pipe ka approximate inner diameter, jo ki ek reference size hai

questions.explanation: Nominal Bore (NB) ya Nominal Pipe Size (NPS) ek standard reference size hai jo pipe ke approximate inner diameter ko darshata hai, actual physical dimensions se thoda alag ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Schedule number pipe ki kis property ko define karta hai?

options.B: Outer Diameter

questions.explanation: Pipe Schedule number (jaise Sch 40, Sch 80) pipe ki wall thickness ko specify karta hai, jo uski pressure bearing capacity ko determine karta hai.

questions.question: Kis pipe material par UV radiation ka sabse zyada bura asar padta hai?

options.B: Copper

questions.explanation: PVC pipes direct sunlight (UV radiation) ke contact mein aane par brittle ho jaate hain aur degrade hone lagte hain, isliye unhe exposed areas mein use karne se pehle protect karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ductile Iron pipes kahan use hote hain?

options.B: High-pressure water distribution mains

questions.explanation: Ductile Iron pipes apni high strength, durability aur corrosion resistance ke karan large-scale municipal water distribution mains aur sewage systems mein use hote hain.

questions.question: Insulation pipe ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Pipe ko decorate karne ke liye
options.B: Heat loss ya heat gain ko minimize karne ke liye
options.C: Pipe ko strong banane ke liye
options.D: Pipe ko clean rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Insulation pipe mein se heat ke flow (loss ya gain) ko reduce karta hai, जिससे energy efficiency improve hoti hai aur condensation bhi control hota hai.

questions.question: Ek pipe ki 'working pressure' kya hoti hai?

options.A: Maximum pressure jo pipe kabhi bhi jhel sakta hai
options.B: Pipe ki design life mein safely handle kar sakne wali maximum continuous pressure

questions.explanation: Working pressure woh maximum pressure hai jis par pipe ko uski design life ke dauraan continuously safely operate kiya ja sakta hai. Ye burst pressure se kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Polyethylene (PE) pipes ka ek common use kya hai?

options.B: Natural gas distribution aur irrigation systems

questions.explanation: PE pipes apni flexibility, corrosion resistance aur leak-free joints ke karan natural gas distribution aur agricultural irrigation systems mein widely use hote hain.

questions.question: Stainless steel pipes kis liye use kiye jaate hain?

options.B: High corrosion resistance aur hygienic applications ke liye

questions.explanation: Stainless steel pipes apni superior corrosion resistance aur hygienic properties ke karan food processing, pharmaceutical aur chemical industries mein use hote hain.

questions.question: Pipe bending se kya achieve kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Pipes mein joints ki sankhya kam karna

questions.explanation: Pipe bending se pipe system mein elbows aur fittings ki zaroorat kam ho jaati hai, jisse leak points kam hote hain aur flow efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Pipe supports ka kya role hai?

options.B: Pipes ko vibration aur thermal expansion se hone wale stress se bachana

questions.explanation: Pipe supports pipe ke weight ko bear karte hain aur thermal expansion, vibration aur seismic loads ke karan hone wale stress ko distribute karte hain, jisse pipe ki integrity bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Pipe identification codes ya color coding kyun use hota hai?

options.A: Pipes ko sundar banane ke liye
options.B: Pipe ke andar flow ho rahe fluid ko identify karne ke liye
options.C: Pipe ke material ko identify karne ke liye
options.D: Pipe ke manufacturer ko identify karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Color coding ya identification codes pipes ke andar flow ho rahe fluid (jaise paani, steam, gas, chemical) ko quickly identify karne mein help karte hain, jo safety aur maintenance ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Solvent cement welding kis type ke pipes ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: PVC aur CPVC pipes

questions.explanation: Solvent cementing ek chemical process hai jo PVC aur CPVC pipes ko permanently join karne ke liye use hota hai, jismein pipe aur fitting ki surfaces ko chemically fuse kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Threaded joint banate waqt leak-proof seal ke liye kya use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Teflon tape (PTFE tape) ya pipe sealant

questions.explanation: Teflon tape (PTFE tape) ya pipe joint compound threaded connections mein gaps ko fill karke leak-proof seal provide karte hain.

questions.question: Flange joint ka main component kya hai?

options.B: Gasket

questions.explanation: Flange joint mein do flanges ko bolting ke through connect kiya jaata hai, aur unke beech mein ek gasket rakha jaata hai jo leak-proof seal provide karta hai.

questions.question: Pipe ko 90 degree par bend karne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?

options.B: Tee

questions.explanation: Elbow fitting pipe direction ko change karne ke liye use hoti hai, commonly 90 degree ya 45 degree par.

questions.question: Do alag-alag diameter ke pipes ko connect karne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?

options.B: Cross

questions.explanation: Reducer fitting do alag-alag size ke pipes ko connect karti hai, ek bade diameter se chhote diameter tak ya vice versa.

questions.question: Solder joint banane ke liye kis metal ki alloy use hoti hai?

options.B: Lead (ab kam use hota hai) aur Tin

questions.explanation: Soldering mein ek filler metal (solder, usually tin-lead alloy ya lead-free tin alloy) ko melt karke do metal parts ko join kiya jaata hai, jaise copper pipes.

questions.question: Welding pipe joining method ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Bahut strong aur leak-proof joint banta hai

questions.explanation: Welding se banaye gaye joints bahut strong aur leak-proof hote hain, aur ye high-pressure aur high-temperature applications ke liye ideal hain.

questions.question: Compression fitting kaise kaam karti hai?

options.B: Solvent use karke
options.C: Nut ko tighten karke ek ferrule ko pipe par compress karke

questions.explanation: Compression fitting mein ek nut ko tighten kiya jaata hai, jo ek ferrule (compression ring) ko pipe par compress karta hai, jisse ek watertight seal banta hai.

questions.question: Pipe system mein maintenance ya future expansion ke liye temporary disconnection ki zaroorat ho to kaun si fitting best hai?

options.B: Solvent cement joint

questions.explanation: Union fitting ek mechanical joint hai jo pipes ko easily connect aur disconnect karne ki facility provide karti hai, bina poori piping system ko disturb kiye.

questions.question: Branch line banane ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?

options.B: Reducer

questions.explanation: Tee fitting ek pipe line se 90 degree par ek branch line nikalne ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: Pipes ke end ko seal karne ke liye kaun si fitting use hoti hai?

options.B: Nipple

questions.explanation: Plug ya cap fitting pipe ke open end ko permanently ya temporarily seal karne ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: PPR pipes ko join karne ka sabse common method kya hai?

options.B: Soldering
options.C: Heat fusion (butt welding ya socket welding)

questions.explanation: PPR pipes ko heat fusion method se join kiya jaata hai, jismein pipe aur fitting ko heat karke fuse kiya jaata hai, jisse ek homogeneous aur leak-proof joint banta hai.

questions.question: Grooved coupling ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Bahut flexible hota hai
options.D: Sabhi metal pipes ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: Grooved couplings fast installation provide karte hain, allow for some pipe movement (thermal expansion/contraction) aur vibration ko absorb karte hain, jo fire protection aur HVAC systems mein common hain.

questions.question: Flange joint mein bolts ko tighten karte waqt kis pattern ka use karna chahiye?

options.B: Anticlockwise pattern

questions.explanation: Flange bolts ko star (cross) pattern mein tighten karna chahiye, taaki gasket par even pressure apply ho aur leak-proof seal bane.

questions.question: Gasket ka material kis factor par depend karta hai?

options.B: Fluid ka temperature, pressure aur chemical compatibility

questions.explanation: Gasket material ka selection pipe system mein flow ho rahe fluid ke temperature, pressure, aur chemical properties par depend karta hai taaki proper sealing aur longevity ensure ho sake.

questions.question: Ek 'Nipple' fitting kya hoti hai?

options.A: Ek chhota pipe piece jiske dono ends par threads hote hain
options.B: Ek fitting jo pipe ka size reduce karti hai
options.C: Ek fitting jo pipe direction change karti hai
options.D: Ek fitting jo pipe ko seal karti hai

questions.explanation: Nipple ek chhota threaded pipe piece hota hai jo do fittings ya pipes ko connect karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Die stock aur dies ka kya use hai?

options.A: Pipes ko cut karne ke liye
options.B: Pipes par external threads banane ke liye
options.C: Pipes ko bend karne ke liye
options.D: Pipes ko clean karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Die stock aur dies ka use metal pipes ke external surface par threads banane ke liye kiya jaata hai taaki unhe threaded fittings se connect kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Fluid flow ko completely isolate (band) karne ke liye kaun sa valve use hota hai?

options.B: Gate valve

questions.explanation: Gate valve ko primarily flow ko ON/OFF karne ke liye use kiya jaata hai. Ye ya to fully open hota hai ya fully closed, throttling ke liye accha nahi hai.

questions.question: Fluid flow ko regulate (throttle) karne ke liye kaun sa valve best hai?

options.B: Ball valve

questions.explanation: Globe valve ko flow regulation ya throttling ke liye design kiya gaya hai, kyunki iska disc flow path ko gradually control karta hai.

questions.question: Backflow ko rokne ke liye kaun sa valve use hota hai?

options.B: Ball valve

questions.explanation: Check valve automatic hota hai aur fluid ko sirf ek direction mein flow hone deta hai, dusri direction mein backflow ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Quarter-turn valve kaun sa hai?

options.B: Globe valve

questions.explanation: Ball valve aur Butterfly valve quarter-turn valves hain, matlab unhe fully open ya closed karne ke liye handle ko sirf 90 degree ghumana padta hai.

questions.question: Valve ke kis part se fluid flow control hota hai?

options.B: Stem

questions.explanation: Disc, ball, ya plug valve ka closing element hota hai jo flow path ko obstruct ya open karta hai, jisse fluid flow control hota hai.

questions.question: Pressure Relief Valve (PRV) ka kya function hai?

options.B: System mein excessive pressure release karna

questions.explanation: PRV system ko over-pressurization se bachata hai. Jab system pressure ek set limit se zyada ho jaata hai, to PRV automatically open hokar pressure release karta hai.

questions.question: Butterfly valve ka main fayda kya hai?

options.B: Lightweight, compact design aur fast operation

questions.explanation: Butterfly valves lightweight, compact hote hain aur quarter-turn operation ke karan fast acting hote hain, jo unhe large diameter pipes aur low-pressure applications ke liye suitable banata hai.

questions.question: Valve ka 'bonnet' section kya provide karta hai?

options.B: Pressure relief
options.C: Valve internals (stem, disc) ke liye sealing aur housing

questions.explanation: Bonnet valve body ka ek component hai jo stem assembly ko cover karta hai aur internal parts ko contain karta hai, saath hi pressure boundary bhi provide karta hai.

questions.question: Needle valve kis liye use hota hai?

options.B: Precise flow regulation for small flows

questions.explanation: Needle valve apni pointed disc aur fine threads ke karan bahut precise flow regulation (throttling) ke liye use hota hai, khaaskar instrumentation aur sampling lines mein.

questions.question: Foot valve kahan install kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Pump ke suction line ke end par, paani ke neeche

questions.explanation: Foot valve ek type ka check valve hota hai jo pump ke suction line ke end par install kiya jaata hai, usually paani ke andar, taaki pump priming maintain rahe aur debris pump mein na ja sake.

questions.question: Diaphragm valve ka kya fayda hai corrosive fluids ke liye?

options.A: Ismein koi moving parts nahi hote
options.B: Process fluid valve operating mechanism se isolate rehta hai
options.C: Bahut high temperature handle kar sakta hai

questions.explanation: Diaphragm valve mein process fluid ek flexible diaphragm dwara operating mechanism se separate rehta hai, jisse corrosive fluids ke liye contamination aur leakage ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Valve ka 'seat' kya hota hai?

options.B: Woh surface jahan disc ya closing element rest karta hai leak-proof seal banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Valve seat woh sealing surface hai jis par disc ya closing element baithta hai jab valve band hota hai, taaki fluid flow completely stop ho sake.

questions.question: Actuator ka kya kaam hai valve mein?

options.B: Valve ko manually operate karna
options.C: Valve ko automatically open ya close karna
options.D: Valve ke andar pressure ko measure karna

questions.explanation: Actuator ek device hai jo valve ko automatically operate karta hai, jaise pneumatic, hydraulic ya electric power ka use karke.

questions.question: Plug valve ka working principle kya hai?

options.B: Linear motion of a wedge
options.C: Rotating cylindrical ya tapered plug with a port

questions.explanation: Plug valve mein ek cylindrical ya tapered plug hota hai jiske through ek port hota hai. Plug ko 90 degree rotate karne se flow path open ya close hota hai.

questions.question: Globe valve mein fluid flow direction ka kya effect hota hai?

options.B: Flow direction change karne se valve damage ho sakta hai
options.C: Proper flow direction pressure drop ko minimize karta hai
options.D: Flow direction se koi farak nahi padta

questions.explanation: Globe valve mein fluid ko seat ke neeche se flow hona chahiye (under the seat) taaki disc ko open karne ke liye kam force lage aur pressure drop kam ho.

questions.question: Pressure Reducing Valve (PRV) ka kya function hai?

options.B: High inlet pressure ko lower, constant outlet pressure mein reduce karna

questions.explanation: Pressure Reducing Valve (PRV) ka kaam hai incoming high pressure ko ek desired lower, stable outlet pressure tak kam karna, taaki downstream equipment protect ho sake.

questions.question: Gate valve mein 'rising stem' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Valve open ya close hai, ye visually pata chal jaata hai

questions.explanation: Rising stem gate valve mein stem upar ki taraf move karta hai jab valve open hota hai, jisse operator ko visually pata chal jaata hai ki valve kis position mein hai.

questions.question: Valve gland packing mein leakage hone ka kya main reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Valve ka color kharab ho gaya hai
options.B: Packing material purana ya worn out ho gaya hai

questions.explanation: Gland packing purani hone ya ghis jaane par apni sealing capability kho deti hai, jisse stem ke paas se leakage hone lagti hai.

questions.question: Leaking gland packing ko theek karne ka pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Gland nuts ko evenly tighten karna

questions.explanation: Halke leakage ke liye, gland nuts ko evenly aur thoda-thoda tighten karke packing ko compress kiya ja sakta hai, jisse leakage ruk jaati hai. Zyada tighten nahi karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar gland nuts tighten karne ke baad bhi leakage band na ho, to kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Packing material ko replace karna

questions.explanation: Agar tightening se leakage band na ho, to iska matlab hai ki packing material completely worn out ho gaya hai aur usse naye packing se replace karna padega.

questions.question: Valve maintenance se pehle sabse zaroori safety step kya hai?

options.B: Line pressure ko relieve karna aur valve ko isolate karna (LOTO)

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi valve par maintenance shuru karne se pehle, line pressure ko relieve karna aur valve ko isolate karna (yaani flow ko band karna aur LOTO lagana) bahut zaroori hai taaki safety ensure ho.

questions.question: Ek valve 'passing' kar raha hai, iska kya matlab hai?

options.A: Valve ka color utar raha hai
options.B: Valve fully closed hone ke baad bhi fluid leak kar raha hai

questions.explanation: Valve passing ka matlab hai ki valve fully closed hone ke baad bhi uske seat se fluid leak kar raha hai, jo worn out seat ya disc ke karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Valve seat leakage ko theek karne ke liye kya karna pad sakta hai?

options.B: Seat ko lap ya grind karna ya disc ko replace karna

questions.explanation: Seat leakage ko theek karne ke liye, valve ke seat aur disc surfaces ko grind ya lap karke smooth kiya jaata hai, ya phir disc ko replace kiya jaata hai taaki proper sealing ho sake.

questions.question: Valve stem ko lubricate kyun karna chahiye?

options.B: Friction ko kam karne aur smooth operation ke liye
options.D: Valve ko tight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Valve stem ko lubricate karne se friction kam hota hai, jisse valve ko operate karna aasan hota hai aur stem ki life bhi badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar valve operate karte waqt bahut zyada force lagana pade, to kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Stem bent ho sakta hai ya packing bahut tight ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Zyada operating force ka matlab ho sakta hai ki stem bent hai, packing bahut zyada tight hai, ya valve ke internal parts mein corrosion ya deposits hain.

questions.question: Check valve ke stuck hone ka kya asar hoga?

options.A: Flow sirf ek direction mein hoga
options.B: Fluid dono directions mein flow ho sakta hai ya flow completely ruk sakta hai

questions.explanation: Agar check valve stuck open ho jaaye, to backflow ho sakta hai. Agar stuck closed ho jaaye, to forward flow bhi ruk jaayega, jisse system malfunction ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Valve 'chattering' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Valve ka color vibrate kar raha hai
options.B: Valve ka disc ya closing element rapid, uncontrolled movement kar raha hai
options.C: Valve se gas leak ho rahi hai

questions.explanation: Chattering ek rapid, uncontrolled movement hai valve ke internal parts ka, jo usually high velocity flow, vibration ya improper sizing ke karan hota hai, jisse valve damage ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Valve repair ke baad kya karna mandatory hai?

options.B: Pressure testing aur functionality check karna

questions.explanation: Valve repair ke baad, uski integrity aur functionality ko verify karne ke liye pressure testing (jaise hydrostatic test) aur operational check karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar valve handle ghumane par bhi valve open ya close na ho, to kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.A: Valve body damage ho gaya hai
options.B: Stem ya disc disconnected ya damaged hai

questions.explanation: Agar handle ghumane par valve response na kare, to ho sakta hai ki stem disc se disconnect ho gaya hai, ya stem threads worn out ho gaye hain, ya koi internal part टूट gaya hai.

questions.question: Valve ka 'blowdown' process kya hota hai?

options.B: Accumulated impurities ko valve ya system se flush out karna

questions.explanation: Blowdown process mein high-pressure fluid ko valve ya system se release kiya jaata hai taaki accumulated sediments, sludge ya impurities ko bahar nikala ja sake, jisse performance maintain rahe.

questions.question: Valve 'packing gland' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Packing ko compress karke stem ke around seal maintain karna

questions.explanation: Packing gland ek component hai jo packing material ko stem ke around compress karta hai, jisse stem aur bonnet ke beech leak-proof seal banta hai.

questions.question: Valve ke identification tag par kya information honi chahiye?

options.B: Valve type, size, material, pressure rating, aur service fluid

questions.explanation: Identification tag par valve ki critical details honi chahiye jaise uska type (gate, globe), size, material (body, trim), pressure aur temperature rating, aur kis fluid ke liye hai, taaki proper selection aur maintenance ho sake.

questions.question: Agar valve bahut zyada noisy ho, to kya indication ho sakta hai?

options.B: Cavitation, flashing ya vibration ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Excessive noise valve mein cavitation (liquid ka vaporize hona aur collapse hona), flashing (liquid ka vapor mein convert hona) ya mechanical vibration ka indication ho sakta hai, jo valve damage kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Pipe cutter ka kya use hai?

options.B: Pipes ko clean cut karna

questions.explanation: Pipe cutter specially design kiya gaya tool hai jo pipes ko clean, straight aur burr-free cut karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Pipe wrench ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Pipes aur fittings ko tighten ya loosen karna

questions.explanation: Pipe wrench ek adjustable wrench hai jiska use pipes aur fittings ko pakadne, ghumane aur tighten/loosen karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Hydrostatic testing kyun ki jaati hai?

options.A: Pipes ko clean karne ke liye
options.B: Pipe system ki strength aur leak integrity check karne ke liye
options.C: Pipes ko insulate karne ke liye
options.D: Pipes ko paint karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hydrostatic testing mein pipe system ko paani se bharkar design pressure se zyada pressure par test kiya jaata hai, taaki uski strength aur leak-proofness ko verify kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Pneumatic testing mein kis fluid ka use hota hai?

options.B: Oil

questions.explanation: Pneumatic testing mein compressed air ya inert gas (jaise nitrogen) ka use kiya jaata hai leak detection ke liye, khaaskar un systems mein jahan paani ka use allowed nahi hai.

questions.question: Pipe reamer ka kya use hai?

options.A: Pipe ke andar se burrs remove karna
options.B: Pipe ko cut karna

questions.explanation: Pipe cut karne ke baad uske inner edge par burrs ban jaate hain. Reamer un burrs ko remove karta hai taaki smooth flow ho aur clog na ho.

questions.question: Measuring tape ka kya importance hai pipe fitting mein?

options.B: Precise measurements ke liye, sahi cut aur fit ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi measurements pipe fitting mein bahut zaroori hain taaki pipes ko accurate length mein cut kiya ja sake aur fittings properly fit ho sakein.

questions.question: Welding karte waqt kis type ke PPE ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: Welding helmet, gloves, fire-resistant clothing

questions.explanation: Welding mein intense UV light, sparks aur heat generate hoti hai, isliye special PPE jaise welding helmet (aankhon aur chehre ki protection ke liye), heat-resistant gloves aur fire-resistant clothing mandatory hai.

questions.question: Leak detection ke liye soap solution ka use kis method mein kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Pneumatic testing

questions.explanation: Pneumatic testing ke dauraan, pressurized system ke joints par soap solution lagakar leaks ko bubbles ke form mein identify kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Pipe system ko flush karne ka kya maqsad hai?

options.B: System se debris, dirt aur contaminants ko remove karna

questions.explanation: Flushing mein high velocity fluid (usually paani) ko system se pass kiya jaata hai taaki construction debris, weld slag, rust aur anya contaminants ko bahar nikala ja sake, jisse system ki performance aur longevity maintain rahe.

questions.question: Flange spreader ka kya use hai?

options.B: Flanges ko thoda separate karna gasket replacement ke liye

questions.explanation: Flange spreader ek tool hai jo do flanges ke beech ek chhota gap banane ke liye use hota hai, jisse gasket ko safely replace ya inspect kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Torque wrench ka kya use hai?

options.A: Kisi bhi bolt ko tight karna
options.B: Bolts ko ek specific torque value par tight karna

questions.explanation: Torque wrench ka use bolts aur nuts ko ek precise, pre-defined torque value par tighten karne ke liye hota hai, jo joint integrity aur leak-proofness ke liye critical hai, khaaskar flange joints mein.

questions.question: Pipe system drawing (P&ID) ka kya importance hai?

options.B: System components, instruments aur piping ka detailed diagram samajhna

questions.explanation: P&ID (Piping and Instrumentation Diagram) ek detailed schematic drawing hai jo process flow, major equipment, piping, valves aur instrumentation ko dikhata hai, jo installation, operation aur maintenance ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi pipe system mein acid ya chemical leak ho raha ho, to pehla action kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Turant safety area mein jaana aur emergency procedure follow karna
options.C: Nange haathon se leak band karna
options.D: Paani daal kar leak theek karna

questions.explanation: Chemical leaks bahut dangerous ho sakte hain. Turant safety area mein jaana, emergency services ko inform karna aur proper PPE pehenkar hi action lena chahiye, agar trained ho.

questions.question: Scaffolding par kaam karte waqt kya safety precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Scaffolding ko hamesha move karte rehna
options.B: Scaffolding ki stability check karna aur fall protection use karna

questions.explanation: Scaffolding par kaam karte waqt uski stability, proper erection aur guardrails ko check karna chahiye. Saath hi, fall arrest system (safety harness) ka use karna bhi zaroori hai.

questions.question: Pipe fitting mein 'As-built' drawing ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Woh drawing jo actual installation ke baad changes ko reflect karti hai

questions.explanation: As-built drawing woh drawing hai jo project complete hone ke baad actual installation mein kiye gaye sabhi changes, modifications aur exact dimensions ko record karti hai. Ye future maintenance aur modifications ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Permit-to-work system ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: High-risk activities ko safely manage aur authorize karna

questions.explanation: Permit-to-work system ek formal procedure hai jo high-risk activities ko control karta hai, jisse yeh ensure hota hai ki kaam shuru karne se pehle sabhi potential hazards ko identify kiya gaya hai aur necessary safety measures implement kiye gaye hain.
